phases.label:
Inquiring &
Analysing
phases.description: Students develop understanding of design problems by identifying needs, analysing existing products and articulating a design brief and specification.

levels.text: States the need; describes one existing product with limited analysis.
Outlines the need; analyses products with some reference to the design brief.
Explains and justifies the need; analyses products; develops a detailed design brief.
Full justification of need; constructs a detailed design brief and specification.

phases.label:
Developing
Ideas
phases.description: Students develop a design specification and generate, develop and present multiple design ideas that respond to that specification.

levels.text: Develops a basic design specification; presents one design idea.
Develops a specification; presents a few ideas with some development.
Develops a detailed specification; evaluates multiple ideas; selects one.
Comprehensive specification; evaluates and justifies a range; fully develops chosen.

phases.label:
Creating the
Solution
phases.description: Students construct a logical plan, demonstrate technical skills and follow the plan to create the solution, justifying any changes made.

nodes.label: Follow
nodes.detail: the plan to make the solution

levels.text: Constructs a basic plan; attempts to demonstrate technical skills.
Constructs a plan; demonstrates adequate skills; follows the plan.
Detailed plan; competent technical skills; justifies some changes.
Logical detailed plan; excellent skills; follows and justifies all changes.

phases.label: Evaluating
phases.description: Students design testing methods, evaluate the success of the solution against the design specification and explain how it could be improved.

nodes.label: Explain
nodes.detail: how the solution could be improved

levels.text: Outlines a basic testing method; states if solution was successful.
Describes testing; evaluates with some reference to specification.
Designs relevant tests; evaluates against specification; suggests improvements.
Detailed tests; full evaluation against spec; justifies detailed improvements.
